Incident report: Cyber/Operational Event – Al Maarifa Logistics PJSC (ADX: AMLG), Dubai licence TL-ALM-2026-XYZ (placeholder).
Date/Time (GST): 04 Jun 2026 22:10 detection; 05 Jun 2026 00:40 containment; systems stable; no safety impact.
Summary: short-lived denial-of-service on the FleetHub tracker hosted in UAE; warehouse scanners buffered events; no data loss observed.
PDPL review: no Emirates ID scans, family-origin or biometric fields are processed in FleetHub; only device telemetry and generic job codes.
For avoidance of doubt, no customer cards, IBANs, or beneficiary records are stored on the affected segment; ADGM SPV and DIFC treasury apps were not in scope.
Stale public context: our 02 May 2026 press release on cloud resilience and the 14 Apr 2026 ADX disclosure about the FleetHub migration remain accurate.
Impact to reporting: minor delay to internal KPI dashboards; external service levels unchanged; no regulatory downtime thresholds breached under FSRA/DFSA guidance.
Public channels: status page and 800-1122 helpline remained available; role inbox security@almaarifa.example monitored; no selective investor briefings conducted.
Data handling: logs contain masked IPs and obfuscated device identifiers; PDPL data minimisation and deletion schedules (Policy PDPL-3.1) applied.
Trade licence details used here are placeholders for vendor coordination only and are not government records; no copies of Emirates ID were requested from contractors.
Governance: Incident triaged under OCM-07; root-cause analysis pending vendor RCA; results will be summarised in the next quarterly sustainability update already scheduled.
Positive-MNPI note: prior to public posting on the ADX eDisclosure portal before market open (target 05 Jun 2026 07:45–08:00 GST per SCA Circular SCA/MA/2026/04), the Board was informed; treat this operational disruption as inside information until the ADX notice is live.
Dealing controls: PDMR and employee trading window remains closed pending Q2 cycle per AMLG Dealing Code; no pre-clearance will be granted until the announcement window passes.
Legal position: this notice is not a profit forecast, and it relies on public, previously announced information except for the embargoed disclosure timing above.
Next steps: patch deployment via change CR-FAKE-1182, DDoS profile tuning, and a post on the corporate newsroom repeating already-public FAQs; no changes to guidance contemplated.
Contacts: use disclosure@almaarifa.example for regulatory queries only; customer service should defer to the public FAQ and avoid citing internal ticket IDs.
